page: Amazon Web Services f2.48xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 192 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) derived from 96 physical AMD processor cores running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with 2.0 threads per core. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention.

The instance is equipped with 2048.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 10.67 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, it includes 7520 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, offering high-speed read and write operations directly on the host. It does not feature any onboard GPUs, focusing its resource profile entirely on CPU, memory, and storage density.

Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, supporting high-throughput data transfers. Given the high memory-to-vCPU ratio, substantial local NVMe storage, and high-speed networking, this server is designed for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale databases, and high-throughput data processing tasks.
description: Amazon Web Services f2.48xlarge is an x86_64 server running on the Nitro hypervisor, designed for memory-intensive and high-throughput workloads. It is equipped with 192 dedicated vCPUs from 96 physical AMD cores operating at 3.4 GHz, alongside 2048.0 GB of system memory. Storage is supported by 7520 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity, and network performance is anchored by a 100 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The server does not include any GPUs. With a high memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB per core and significant local storage, this instance is optimized for large-scale databases, memory-intensive data processing, and enterprise applications requiring high-speed local I/O and substantial network throughput. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource contention.

tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized server featuring dedicated AMD processors, extensive local NVMe SSD storage, and high-speed hundred-gigabit networking.

2048.0 GB of system memory providing 10.67 GB per core

Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor architecture
